hook.text: In 2022, Tonga's Hunga Tonga eruption was the most powerful explosion recorded by modern instruments.

buildup.text: The blast sent a shockwave around the world twice and triggered tsunamis across the Pacific.

discovery.text: The eruption vaporized most of the island, leaving only two small remnants above water.

twist.text: It injected so much water vapor into the stratosphere that it may temporarily warm the climate.

climax.text: Island nations sit on geological time bombs that can erase them in hours.

punchline.text: The ocean gives islands. It also takes them back.

quiz.question: What happened to Hunga Tonga island after its 2022 eruption?
options: Most of the island was vaporized
